channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: The $3.7bn man: Inside one of US’s biggest Medicare frauds
item.description: US businessman has been arrested in Turkiye after a year on the run from authorities.

item.title: South African police investigate murder amid rise in anti-migrant attacks
item.description: The rise in anti-migrant attacks in South Africa has already left several people dead, with hundreds trying to leave.

item.title: More than 5,300 people still held in Myanmar scam centres: rights group
item.description: A UN report found the facilities are operated by foreign nationals who were trafficked by criminal gangs.

item.title: Republican-linked PACs funding Democratic US primaries: Why it matters
item.description: Republicans and Democrats have both employed tactics to boost weaker rivals ahead of US midterm elections.

item.title: Demand for tunnel maps and personal weapons tests Gaza talks
item.description: Gaza talks remain active, but stall as the US envoy demands the handover of tunnel maps and family arms.

item.title: Mexico exhibition relives memories of Qatar World Cup 2022
item.description: An exhibition in Mexico held during the World Cup explores the legacy of Qatar 2022.

item.title: Kenya minister says US-run Ebola facility plans halted after court order
item.description: Kenya stops constructing US-run Ebola site amid public outcry; $13.5m US funding is criticised as masking health risks.

item.title: Portugal vs Uzbekistan LIVE: World Cup 2026
item.description: Follow live updates as Cristiano Ronaldo and Portugal face Uzbekistan, including the build-up and live text commentary.

item.title: What the US and Iran agreed – and disagreed – on first day of talks
item.description: Leaders from Iran and the US have lauded progress on day one of Switzerland talks but disagree about crucial aspects.

item.title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, T20 IPL batting prodigy, receives first India jersey
item.description: Teenage star receives first India shirt from BCCI and is tipped to make his debut in a T20 match in Ireland on Friday.

item.title: Former PM says Israel smuggled Starlink internet systems into Iran
item.description: Former PM Naftali Bennett has admitted Israel smuggled Starlink internet systems into Iran.

item.title: Israeli fire kills two in Lebanon as Hezbollah slams truce ‘violation’
item.description: Lebanese armed group Hezbollah denounced the 'treacherous attack', saying it was a 'blatant' violation of the truce.

item.title: Arab fans celebrate World Cup results in New York
item.description: Arab fans have come together in New York to show support for all Arab teams at the World Cup.

item.title: Palestinian children targeted in genocide, war crimes in Gaza: UN inquiry
item.description: UN commission of inquiry says Israel's deliberate targeting of Palestinian children in Gaza resulted in genocide.

item.title: NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani doubles down on criticism of AIPAC
item.description: Zohran Mamdani says AIPAC's has been supportive of a 'status quo for immorality' in Palestine, wider region.

item.title: Why is Israel being accused of meddling in Colombia presidential election?
item.description: President Gustavo Petro claims digital manipulation affected the results, but attorney general dismisses allegations.

item.title: How does air conditioning work, and how does it affect your body?
item.description: While AC keeps us cool, it can also cause dry skin and irritation. Here are some tips to keep comfortable this summer.

item.title: Mamdani defends AIPAC ‘monsters’ comment
item.description: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani has defended calling AIPAC ‘monsters’.

item.title: Iran’s President Pezeshkian lands in Pakistan for talks after US deal
item.description: Pakistan hosts Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian after mediating the breakthrough US-Iran negotiations in Switzerland.

item.title: Watch World Cup Day 12: Argentina, France advance to knockouts; Jordan out
item.description: Latest match highlights, reaction and previews from the FIFA World Cup 2026 in North America.

item.title: Vondrousova, ex-Wimbledon champion, insists she has ‘never doped’
item.description: Vondrousova, who won Wimbledon in 2023, was issued a four-year ban from tennis after she refused to submit a ⁠sample.

item.title: What Israeli and Lebanese officials are saying before Washington talks
item.description: Iran has made a ceasefire in Lebanon a key condition in its ongoing negotiations with the US.

item.title: After a decade, Brexit’s cost to Britain is not only economic
item.description: Hateful discourse in politics and society has become a regular feature since the UK voted to abandon the EU.

item.title: Brexit 10 years on: What has changed in the UK explained in maps and charts
item.description: Brexit promised a better Britain. A decade on, the numbers tell a different story. Al Jazeera breaks it down.

item.title: Kane, England play Ghana at the World Cup: Prediction, team news, lineups
item.description: Harry Kane's England and Ghana meet in the 2026 FIFA World Cup Group L, with the winner advancing to the round of 32.
